text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is incredibly fast, but I'm the one who
ends up winning! Helios even gives me a smooch
to celebrate(?) for some reason!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Zephyr also congratulates me on my win, but
she's acting a little strange...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm worried about her, but right now I just want to
cook up some good food in celebration with
Trainer! ♪
